chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3589 of 2019 Syed Imdad Ali Shah Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability. Dated: 06.05.2025 None present for the petitioner. Ms. Wajeeha Mehdi, Deputy Attorney General. -.-.- This is an old case of 2019, which is over six years old. On the last date of hearing on 04.07.2019 the petitioner sought an adjournment as his counsel was unwell and the matter was adjourned with direction to satisfy this Court about maintainability of this petition failing which appropriate orders would be passed. The question of maintainability still remains outstanding and despite lapse of six years learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition despite lapse of six years and as such the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Head of Const. Benches Judge
